overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through an industrial facility interior toward a door labeled 'Lounge'. The environment features concrete floors, metal support pillars, and artificial lighting. The character approaches and opens the door at the end of the clip.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial facility toward the Lounge entrance

notable_agents.action: sitting on the ground leaning against a metal support pillar

entered.detail: double sliding metal door with glass panels
illuminated green sign reading 'Lounge' mounted above the door
large cylindrical support pillar with blue painted base
metal utility cart with stacked white containers and yellow hazard stripes
dark rectangular screen mounted on the industrial wall paneling
exposed metal piping running horizontally along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious industrial facility lobby with concrete flooring and metal support pillars. A lone NPC sits on the ground near a pillar to the right as the character approaches the Lounge door ahead. Equipment carts and wall-mounted monitors line the sides of the corridor.

events.description: character approaches and triggers the automatic sliding door to open, revealing the Lounge interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the Lounge door and triggering the automatic door opening mechanism

entered.detail: metallic door frame surrounding the Lounge entrance
interior space visible through the opening door with warm lighting and furniture

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the Lounge entrance, triggering the automatic sliding door to open. The interior of the Lounge becomes visible through the doorway as the character prepares to enter the new space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial lobby that culminates in the opening of a restricted interior space. It begins with the character walking across concrete flooring past metal support pillars, equipment carts, and wall-mounted monitors. As the character advances, the camera passes a lone NPC sitting on the ground to the right while maintaining focus on the Lounge door ahead. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the entrance, triggering the automatic sliding doors to glide open. This movement reveals the interior of the Lounge, transitioning the view from the wide corridor into the threshold of the new room.
